entry.title: Bill 42 (Hawaiʻi County): Adopted → —
entry.content:
AMENDS ORDINANCE NO. 24-32, AS AMENDED, THE OPERATING BUDGET FOR THE COUNTY OF HAWAIʻI FOR THE FISCAL YEAR ENDING JUNE 30, 2025

Increases revenues in the Interest – Other Federal account ($660,000)

Status: Adopted → —

Latest action: On agenda 2025-05-21

View on the council site

entry.title: New: Bill 42 (Hawaiʻi County) — Adopted
entry.content:
AMENDS ORDINANCE NO. 24-32, AS AMENDED, THE OPERATING BUDGET FOR THE COUNTY OF HAWAIʻI FOR THE FISCAL YEAR ENDING JUNE 30, 2025

Increases revenues in the Interest – Other Federal account ($660,000)

Latest action: Council: Bill 42 passes second & final reading - 05/21/25

View on the council site
